title: Dev Nyx Enhancement + TestForge GUI Fix + Dev Skills

stories.title: Create development skills in ARIA common skills
acceptanceCriteria: blaq-vanilla-spa skill exists at ~/.aria/skills/blaq-vanilla-spa/SKILL.md with vanilla JS SPA best practices
blaq-ui-ux-review skill exists at ~/.aria/skills/blaq-ui-ux-review/SKILL.md with UX heuristics and checklist
blaq-css-design skill exists at ~/.aria/skills/blaq-css-design/SKILL.md with modern CSS patterns (variables, grid, flexbox, responsive)
blaq-qa-testing skill exists at ~/.aria/skills/blaq-qa-testing/SKILL.md with QA workflow and testing patterns
Each skill has SKILL.md with triggers, instructions, and references

stories.title: Update dev Nyx agent with new skills + cross-runtime access
acceptanceCriteria: ~/.aria/agents/dev/AGENT.md skill mapping table includes all 4 new skills
~/.aria/agents/dev/AGENT.md has cross-runtime section explaining skill access from OpenClaw/Claude Code
~/.aria/knowledge/dev-skills.md created with skill inventory for other runtimes to reference

stories.title: Fix TestForge GUI browser bugs
acceptanceCriteria: Event listener duplication fixed (container listeners only attached once)
simpleMarkdown XSS risk mitigated (esc() applied before bold/italic transforms)
AbortController timeout added to api() function

stories.title: TestForge dogfooding with new GUI + Plaza communication
acceptanceCriteria: testforge analyze + generate runs successfully on TestForge Self-Test with new GUI code
testforge analyze + generate runs on AgentHive QA project
Both projects show valid data via web API
Server running on port 8321 with new code
